content_hints.description: This dilapidated, two-towered edifice stands tall in the Southern Ward, its neighbors aware of the magical force field that surrounds it, and light from continual flamespells spills from its windows. Most folk believe the structure is abandoned, though others think it is haunted by the ghosts of the Kolat brothers.
content_hints.read_aloud: You see two dilapidated towers standing tall in the Southern Ward, their neighbors aware of the magical force field that surrounds them. Light from continual flamespells spills from the windows, yet most folk believe the structure is abandoned, haunted by the ghosts of the Kolat brothers.

npcs.name: Manshoon
npcs.role: He posts no visible guards outside Kolat Towers, since he wants others to believe the site is abandoned.

hazards.name: Arcane Ward (alarm triggers on forced entry)

event_triggers: On forced entry: A silent alarm alerts all inhabitants. Stealth checks inside are made at disadvantage for 1 minute.

content_hints.description: This dilapidated, two-towered edifice stands tall in the Southern Ward, surrounded by a magical force field that prevents anything from passing through, including air, fog, rain, and snow. Light from continual flamespells spills out of the windows, yet most folk believe the structure is abandoned, thinking it is haunted by the ghosts of the Kolat brothers.
content_hints.read_aloud: You see a dilapidated, two-towered edifice standing tall in the Southern Ward. Neighbors speak of a magical force field surrounding it, and you can see light from continual flamespells spilling out of the windows, despite the persistent magical effects.

npcs.name: Manshoon
npcs.role: He posts no visible guards outside Kolat Towers, since he wants others to believe the site is abandoned.

event_triggers: On disturbance: The animated armor activates only if items are touched or removed.

content_hints.description: Kolat Towers is a multistory structure where each level stands 20 feet higher than the one below it, featuring rooms with 15-foot-high ceilings and 7-foot-high doorways connecting them. Climbing the outside walls without equipment requires a successful DC 15 Strength (Athletics) check.
content_hints.read_aloud: You see a multistory structure, the Kolat Towers, where each level stands twenty feet higher than the one below it. The rooms boast fifteen-foot-high ceilings and seven-foot-high doorways connecting them.

npcs.name: Mirt or Volo
npcs.role: an NPC familiar with Waterdeep’s history, can also provide this information

loot.name: Tome: 'The Arcane Brotherhood -- A History' (quest lore)

event_triggers: On search (DC 15 Investigation): A journal reveals the towers were built by the Kolat brothers, wizards who vanished decades ago. Manshoon claimed the space after.

content_hints.description: This dilapidated, two-towered edifice stands tall in the Southern Ward, and its neighbors are aware of the magical force field that surrounds it. Light from continual flamespells spills out of the windows, though most folk believe the structure is abandoned.
content_hints.read_aloud: You see a dilapidated, two-towered edifice standing tall in the Southern Ward. Neighbors whisper of a magical force field surrounding it, and you can see light from continual flamespells spilling out of the windows, despite the persistent magical effects.

npcs.name: Duhlark
npcs.role: Kolat Towers once belonged to two eccentric brothers, Duhlark and Alcedor Kolat.

npcs.name: Alcedor Kolat
npcs.role: Kolat Towers once belonged to two eccentric brothers, Duhlark and Alcedor Kolat.

content_hints.description: This dilapidated, two-towered edifice stands tall in the Southern Ward, and its neighbors are aware of the magical force field that surrounds it. Light from continual flamespells spills out of the windows, though most folk believe the structure is abandoned.
content_hints.read_aloud: You see the dilapidated, two-towered edifice standing tall in the Southern Ward. Neighbors are aware of the magical force field surrounding it, and you can see light from continual flamespells spilling out of the windows. Despite these persistent magical effects, most folk believe the structure is abandoned, haunted by the ghosts of the Kolat brothers.

npcs.name: Manshoon
npcs.role: evil wizard and his underlings come and go using teleportation circles

event_triggers: On search: The ley line map reveals the approximate location of the Vault of Dragons beneath the city.

content_hints.description: This dilapidated, two-towered edifice stands tall in the Southern Ward, its neighbors aware of the magical force field that surrounds it. Light from continual flamespells spills out of the windows, yet most folk believe the structure is abandoned, though others think it is haunted by the ghosts of the Kolat brothers.
content_hints.read_aloud: You step onto the open rooftop of the dilapidated, two-towered edifice, where the wind whips your cloak and stings your eyes. You see light from continual flamespells spilling out of the windows, despite the persistent magical effects.

npcs.name: Manshoon
npcs.role: He posts no visible guards outside Kolat Towers, since he wants others to believe the site is abandoned.

hazards.name: Rooftop gusts (Strength save or pushed toward edge)

event_triggers: On activation: The circle connects to Manshoon's sanctum. Activating it without the correct passphrase deposits the user in a random location in Undermountain.

content_hints.description: Kolat Towers is a multistory structure where each level stands 20 feet higher than the one below it, featuring rooms with 15-foot-high ceilings and 7-foot-high doorways connecting them. Rooms and corridors are brightly lit by continual flame spells cast on wall sconces.
content_hints.read_aloud: You see a multistory structure, with each level standing twenty feet higher than the one below it. Its rooms boast fifteen-foot-high ceilings, connected by doorways seven feet high.

npcs.name: Volo
npcs.role: NPC familiar with Waterdeep’s history, such as Mirt or Volo, can also provide this information.

npcs.name: Manshoon
npcs.role: Lurks in Kolat Towers, a pair of wizards’ towers in the Trades Ward.

loot.name: Staff of Power (cursed -- attunes to Manshoon on death)

event_triggers: On combat start: The simulacrum speaks with Manshoon's voice: 'You found the basement. How industrious. How unfortunate.'
On defeat: The simulacrum dissolves into snow. A sending stone on the desk crackles with Manshoon's real voice: 'That was merely a copy. I have many.'
